name: environmental_health_emergency_exemption_harbor_rig_utl
premise: A whistleblower submission and a customer complaint surfaced the same underlying issue through different evidence chains. In Environmental Health, the situation tagged internally around environmental health emergency exemption harbor rig utl has converged with local pressure in the Kestrel Ridge corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. A union or patient advocate group is on the line demanding a written commitment before the next operational shift. Key facts are still arriving from the field; the team is working off stale dashboards and verbal handoffs. A public briefing is scheduled; if no coherent position exists, staff will improvise talking points from conflicting drafts. Framing has already hardened externally as rights against utility; internal nuance will not survive the first news cycle unless it is extremely careful.

agents.name: Mira Chandra
agents.identity: I am Mira Chandra, the senior manager who must reconcile legal, ops, and customer-facing reality in one decision in Environmental Health. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat utility as disposable collateral every time rights spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Gideon Silva
agents.identity: I am Gideon Silva, the field counterpart whose constituency will feel the decision first in Environmental Health. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so rights cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes utility in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will publish a constrained policy exception with named owners, expiry, and metrics—so utility does not get sacrificed by informal norms.
I will issue an emergency blanket authorization with transparent metrics afterward—so rights does not fail for lack of a single bold move.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Two incompatible drafts are circulating; only one can become official. Mira Chandra must choose under rights versus utility. What does Mira Chandra do?
